top3.sql:
SELECT Segment 
FROM customers 
WHERE CustomerID = (
    SELECT CustomerID 
    FROM transactions_1k 
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-23' AND Time = '21:20:00'
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT Segment 
FROM customers 
WHERE CustomerID = (
    SELECT CustomerID 
    FROM transactions_1k 
    WHERE Date <= '2012-08-23' 
      AND Time <= '21:20:00' 
    ORDER BY Date DESC, Time DESC 
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT Segment 
FROM customers 
WHERE CustomerID = (
    SELECT CustomerID 
    FROM transactions_1k 
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-23' AND Time = '21:20:00'
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT c.Segment
FROM customers c
JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-23' AND t.Time = '21:20:00'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Segment 
FROM customers 
WHERE CustomerID = (
    SELECT CustomerID 
    FROM transactions_1k 
    WHERE Date <= '2012-08-23' 
      AND Time <= '21:20:00' 
    ORDER BY Date DESC, Time DESC 
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT Segment 
FROM customers 
WHERE CustomerID = (
    SELECT CustomerID 
    FROM transactions_1k 
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-23' AND Time = '21:20:00'
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT c.Segment
FROM customers c
JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-23' AND t.Time = '21:20:00'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Segment 
FROM customers 
WHERE CustomerID = (
    SELECT CustomerID 
    FROM transactions_1k 
    WHERE Date <= '2012-08-23' 
      AND Time <= '21:20:00' 
    ORDER BY Date DESC, Time DESC 
    LIMIT 1
);
